name: swift-sim-companion
description: Teach Codex to start and hand off local Xcode Simulator sessions to the Swift Sim iOS companion app.

interface.shortDescription: Hand Codex-run Simulator sessions to iPhone.
interface.longDescription: A Codex workflow companion skill that builds or reuses a Mac-hosted iOS Simulator session, starts the Swift Sim helper, and returns a native iOS companion link.
defaultPrompt: Open this iOS app in Swift Sim Companion.
Build and hand me a simulator companion link.
Start a remote simulator session for my phone.
